text: Dad! So excited for the party on the 18th! Michael's parents are flying in from San Juan on Thursday. Can we do a family dinner Friday night before the big day?
Aaron, I noticed the duplex mortgage payment went up to $1,900 this month. Did we get an escrow adjustment notice? The original was $1,850. Check the mail or call Chase.
Aaron mou, Mama and I want to come for the engagement party! Can you check flights from Thessaloniki? We need a place to stay too. Is there a hotel near the restaurant?
Eleni, engagement party final headcount is around 60 - I'll confirm catering with the original location.
Andreas, can you cover Alt 19 Saturday dinner? I need to be off the floor for Sophia's party.
Maria, please send me the Alt 19 shift map for next week - two servers short, need coverage.
George, reminder no Sunday shifts for you - building coverage around church.
Katerina, sending the monthly 500 euros for Yiayia Maria this week as usual.
Tony, did the duplex Unit B AC get scheduled? Keep it under 300 or check with me first.
Petros, fishing Saturday if the marine forecast holds - out by 6 from Anclote.
Sophia, is it the 17th confirmed for the party? The calendar says Saturday the 17th.
Stavros, octopus and branzino counts for the weekend please, festival crowd expected.
Eleni, State Farm restaurant renewal came in - forwarding for the books.
Michael, welcome lunch Friday the 16th at the original - your parents are set.
Fr. Konstantinos, parish council agenda documents are in Slack for Tuesday.
Andreas, DoorDash margin at Alt 19 still thin - let's review before expanding.
Maria, Toast terminal 2 dropping tickets at dinner - opened a ticket with the vendor.
Katerina, book the every-other-year Thessaloniki trip fare watch - Amadeus alert set.
